body.title: CLOSED: COA spawn primitive — CPU gate, intra-box milieu, multi-COA tests
body.result: spawn(), CPU gate (IGOR_COA_CPU_GATE), background tick loop, dissolve on empty queue. 12 tests in test_coa_spawn.py. Intra-box milieu via existing global file. Commit 1dc0255a.
body.description:
Build on T-coa-object-wrap. Add the spawn-a-second-COA capability with load gating.

Pieces:
1. COA.spawn() — creates a second COA instance, starts its tick loop, registers with daemon_supervisor
2. CPU gate: blocks spawn when CPU > IGOR_COA_CPU_GATE (default 60%) over 60s rolling window
3. Intra-box milieu propagation: extend cross-box pattern from memory_sync to intra-box COAs (each COA gets own milieu that shares partial propagation with other COAs on the same box)
4. Sleep-and-dissolve: background COA's tick() exits cleanly when its task queue is exhausted

HIGH-inertia pre-approval: Akien stamped 2026-05-07 for main.py, milieu.py — covers this child.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/coa.py (spawn method + dissolve), wild_igor/igor/main.py (spawn trigger hook), wild_igor/igor/cognition/milieu.py (intra-box propagation), tests/test_coa_spawn.py (new)
**Design rules:** docs-in-code, no-sqlite, test-plan-or-why-not
**Scope boundary:** IN — spawn, CPU gate, milieu intra-box, sleep+dissolve, isolation tests. OUT — COA-decides-to-spawn-based-on-boredom-engram, fleet-wide COA visibility (T-swarm-manager), GUI surfacing of COAs.
**Test plan:** tests/test_coa_spawn.py — spawn 2nd COA, assert NE/TWM isolation (separate instances), assert CPU gate refuses 5th COA, assert background COA dissolves after empty queue. Existing single-COA tests still pass.
